title: WAN-241 Fake voice actor audition held! How far can you go in the sexual harassment practical examination? - Sakurasena
overview: Fool Kawaiko-tan, who just graduated from the Boyfriend! Girls who came to audition for a certain voice actor production. However, it turned out to be a bogus agency that eats up dreams and hopes! ? Girls are forced to take sex lessons without knowing that they are being deceived. [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
